listenEntity.description: Leave empty to listen to app

listenScriptName.description: Leave empty to listen to entity

gravity.title: Gravity
gravity.description: Gravity to use when approximating the friction max force.

axes.title: Axes
axes.description: The axes on which the simulation is run.

maxSubSteps.title: Max Substeps
maxSubSteps.description: Maximum number of fixed steps to take when stepping the simulation.

solverIterations.title: Solver Iterations
solverIterations.description: The maximum number of iterations to do when solving. More gives better results, but is more expensive.

solverTolerance.title: Solver Tolerance
solverTolerance.description: The error tolerance, per constraint. If the total error is below this limit, the solver will stop iterating. Set to zero for as good solution as possible, but to something larger than zero to make computations faster.

sleepMode.title: Sleep Mode
sleepMode.description: How to deactivate bodies during simulation. Possible modes are: "No Sleeping", "Body Sleeping" and "Island Sleeping". If sleeping is enabled, you might need to wake up the bodies if they fall asleep. If you want to enable sleeping in the world, but want to disable it for a particular body, see p2Body.allowSleep.

islandSplit.title: Island Split
islandSplit.description: Whether to enable island splitting. Island splitting can be an advantage for both precision and performance.

debugDraw.title: Debug Draw
debugDraw.description: Render a visual representation of the physics world in the running app.

friction.title: Friction
friction.description: The friction coefficient for this material.

restitution.title: Restitution
restitution.description: The restitution for this material, defining its bounciness.

angle.title: Angle
angle.description: Body-local angle of the shape in degrees.

collisionGroup.title: Collision Group
collisionGroup.description: Collision group that this shape belongs to (bit mask).

collisionMask.title: Collision Mask
collisionMask.description: Collision mask of this shape. See collisionGroup.

sensor.title: Sensor
sensor.description: Set to true if you want this shape to be a sensor. A sensor does not generate contacts, but it still reports contact events. This is good if you want to know if a shape is overlapping another shape, without them generating contacts.

angle.title: Angle
angle.description: Body-local angle of the shape in degrees.

collisionGroup.title: Collision Group
collisionGroup.description: Collision group that this shape belongs to (bit mask).

collisionMask.title: Collision Mask
collisionMask.description: Collision mask of this shape. See .collisionGroup.

sensor.title: Sensor
sensor.description: Set to true if you want this shape to be a sensor. A sensor does not generate contacts, but it still reports contact events. This is good if you want to know if a shape is overlapping another shape, without them generating contacts.

length.title: Length
length.description: The distance between the end points.

angle.title: Angle
angle.description: Body-local angle of the shape in degrees.

collisionGroup.title: Collision Group
collisionGroup.description: Collision group that this shape belongs to (bit mask).

collisionMask.title: Collision Mask
collisionMask.description: Collision mask of this shape. See .collisionGroup.

sensor.title: Sensor
sensor.description: Set to true if you want this shape to be a sensor. A sensor does not generate contacts, but it still reports contact events. This is good if you want to know if a shape is overlapping another shape, without them generating contacts.

angle.title: Angle
angle.description: Body-local angle of the shape in degrees.

collisionGroup.title: Collision Group
collisionGroup.description: Collision group that this shape belongs to (bit mask).

collisionMask.title: Collision Mask
collisionMask.description: Collision mask of this shape. See .collisionGroup.

sensor.title: Sensor
sensor.description: Set to true if you want this shape to be a sensor. A sensor does not generate contacts, but it still reports contact events. This is good if you want to know if a shape is overlapping another shape, without them generating contacts.

type.title: Type
type.description: The type of motion this body has. Should be one of: 0 (Static), 1 (Dynamic) and 2 (Kinematic). Static bodies do not move, and they do not respond to forces or collision. Dynamic bodies body can move and respond to collisions and forces. Kinematic bodies only moves according to its velocity, and does not respond to collisions or force.

velocity.title: Velocity
velocity.description: The current velocity of the body.

angularVelocity.title: Angular Velocity
angularVelocity.description: The angular velocity of the body, in degrees per second.

damping.title: Damping
damping.description: The linear damping acting on the body in the velocity direction. Should be a value between 0 and 1.

angularDamping.title: Angular Damping
angularDamping.description: The angular damping acting on the body. Should be a value between 0 and 1.

gravityScale.title: Gravity Scale
gravityScale.description: Gravity scaling factor. If you want the body to ignore gravity, set this to zero. If you want to reverse gravity, set it to -1.

fixedX.title: Fixed X
fixedX.description: Set to true if you want to fix the body movement along the X axis. The body will still be able to move along Y.

fixedY.title: Fixed Y
fixedY.description: Set to true if you want to fix the body movement along the Y axis. The body will still be able to move along X.

fixedRotation.title: Fixed Rotation
fixedRotation.description: Set to true if you want to fix the rotation of the body.

allowSleep.title: Allow Sleep
allowSleep.description: If true, the body will automatically fall to sleep. Note that you need to enable sleeping in the p2World before anything will happen.

sleepSpeedLimit.title: Sleep Speed Limit
sleepSpeedLimit.description: If the speed (the norm of the velocity) is smaller than this value, the body is considered sleepy.

sleepTimeLimit.title: Sleep Time Limit
sleepTimeLimit.description: If the body has been sleepy for this sleepTimeLimit seconds, it is considered sleeping.

collisionResponse.title: Collision Response
collisionResponse.description: Whether to produce contact forces when in contact with other bodies. Note that contacts will be generated, but they will be disabled. That means that this body will move through other bodies, but it will still trigger contact events, etc.

useInterpolatedPosition.title: Use Interpolated Position
useInterpolatedPosition.description: Keep enabled for smoother movement, disable for oddities where interpolation is causing issues.

entityA.title: Entity A
entityA.description: First entity with body participating in the constraint.

localAnchorA.title: Local Anchor A
localAnchorA.description: Local anchor in body A specified in local body coordinates.

entityB.title: Entity B
entityB.description: Second entity with body participating in the constraint.

localAnchorB.title: Local Anchor B
localAnchorB.description: Local anchor in body B specified in local body coordinates.

collideConnected.title: Collide Connected
collideConnected.description: Set to true if you want the connected bodies to collide.

entityA.title: Entity A
entityA.description: First entity with body participating in the constraint.

localAnchorA.title: Local Anchor A
localAnchorA.description: Local anchor in body A specified in local body coordinates.

entityB.title: Entity B
entityB.description: Second entity with body participating in the constraint.

localAnchorB.title: Local Anchor B
localAnchorB.description: Local anchor in body B specified in local body coordinates.

localAxisA.title: Local Axis A
localAxisA.description: An axis, defined in body A frame, that body B's anchor point may slide along.

disableRotationalLock.title: Disable Rotational Lock
disableRotationalLock.description: If set to true, body of entityB will be free to rotate around its anchor point.

collideConnected.title: Collide Connected
collideConnected.description: Set to true if you want the connected bodies to collide.

entityA.title: Entity A
entityA.description: First entity with body participating in the constraint.

localPivotA.title: Local Pivot A
localPivotA.description: Local pivot in body A specified in local body coordinates.

entityB.title: Entity B
entityB.description: Second entity with body participating in the constraint.

localPivotB.title: Local Pivot B
localPivotB.description: Local pivot in body B specified in local body coordinates.

collideConnected.title: Collide Connected
collideConnected.description: Set to true if you want the connected bodies to collide.

motorSpeed.title: Motor Speed
motorSpeed.description: Set the speed of the rotational constraint motor.

anchorA.title: Anchor A
anchorA.description: Where to hook the spring to body A, in local body coordinates or world space coordinates. Defaults to the body center in local space.

anchorASpace.title: Anchor A Space
anchorASpace.description: The coordinate space for anchor A. Can be local body space or world space.

anchorB.title: Anchor B
anchorB.description: Where to hook the spring to body B, in local body coordinates or world space coordinates. Defaults to the body center in local space.

anchorBSpace.title: Anchor B Space
anchorBSpace.description: The coordinate space for anchor B. Can be local body space or world space.

stiffness.title: Stiffness
stiffness.description: Stiffness of the spring. See Hookes Law.

stiffness.title: Stiffness
stiffness.description: Stiffness of the spring. See Hookes Law.

engineForce.title: Engine Force
engineForce.description: The force to apply to the back wheel.

reverseForce.title: Reverse Force
reverseForce.description: The force to apply to the back wheel when reversing.

brakeForce.title: Brake Force
brakeForce.description: The force to apply to the back wheel when braking.

maxSteer.title: Max Steer
maxSteer.description: The maximum steer angle in degrees.

frontWheelOffset.title: Front Offset
frontWheelOffset.description: The offset in local body coordinates of the front wheel.

frontWheelFriction.title: Front Friction
frontWheelFriction.description: The side friction to apply to the front wheel.

backWheelOffset.title: Back Offset
backWheelOffset.description: The offset in local body coordinates of the back wheel.

backWheelFriction.title: Back Friction
backWheelFriction.description: The side friction to apply to the back wheel.

loadingScenes.title: Scene(s) to load with
loadingScenes.description: Scenes which we load these assets for

unloadingScenes.title: Scene(s) to unload for
unloadingScenes.description: Scenes which we unload these assets for

assetsToLoad.title: Assets to Load
assetsToLoad.description: Array of assets we'll be loading

languages.title: Languages(s) to load for
languages.description: Leave empty to load for all languages

gelPanelEntity.title: Gel Panel (Optional)
gelPanelEntity.description: Optional - Will use world space position to calculate left/top if not assigned

staticWidth.title: Static Width (px)
staticWidth.description: Forced Static Width in pixels, based on a canvas height of 1000px (will auto scale). Use for auto line breaking.

fireEntity.description: Leave empty to fire on app

fireScriptName.description: Leave empty to listen to entity

mobileAtlas.title: Mobile CSS & Atlas
mobileAtlas.description: CSS atlas pair for mobile devices

tabletAtlas.title: Tablet CSS & Atlas
tabletAtlas.description: CSS atlas pair for tablet devices

loadingScenes.title: Scene(s) to load with
loadingScenes.description: Scenes which we load these assets for

unloadingScenes.title: Scene(s) to unload for
unloadingScenes.description: Scenes which we unload these assets for

anchor.description: A child entity which acts as the root of the carousel. This is the object which actually moves.

entries.description: A child entity which holds all of the entries. Each child of this entity will be considered an entry.

entryDirectionAngle.description: An angle in degrees which indicates the direction the carousel should span. 0 is straight right.

entrySeparationDistance.description: The distance in units each entry is assumed to be placed. Used to calculate snap points.

selectedIndex.description: The selected entry index. This can be read and set dynamically to check and move the carousel.

disableOffscreenEntries.description: Whether the carousel should disable off screen entries.

wrapEntries.description: Whether the carousel should wrap entries at each end.

wrappingPointValue.description: An offset from the origin for the point entries are wrapped around.

maxVelocity.description: The maximum speed the carousel should move at when snapping.

swipeVelocityMultiplier.description: A scalar for swipe gestures to allow stronger "flicks".

updateEntryDistance.description: When using UpdateEntry() effects, this is the distance used to scale the ratio value.

clampDistance.description: The distance to clamp drag movements off each end of the carousel.

inputRectEntity.description: The element representing the rect we allow movement on if touch starts within. Leave empty for full screen input.

maximumScrollableIndexOffset.description: The offset from max index we clamp to

parentCameraEntity.description: The camera this entity is rendered by. Used for screen to world transformations.

angle.description: Body-local angle of the shape in degrees.
